title: cross tenant payment access returns 404
description: Login as seeded admin with clientApp=admin, create or fetch a payment resource scoped to Tenant A, then request it under Tenant B context and assert HTTP 404 (never 403).

title: cross tenant user access returns 404
description: Login as seeded admin and fetch or create a user under Tenant A. Attempt access/update via Tenant B context on /api/admin/users surfaces and assert HTTP 404.

title: tenant context isolation on admin users list
description: Call /api/admin/users with Tenant A and Tenant B contexts separately and assert response sets are isolated with no cross-tenant leakage.

title: tenant context isolation on admin payments list
description: Call /api/admin/payments under two different tenant contexts and verify each request only returns its own tenant data with no overlap.
